name: alchemy
description: Installable Alchemy developer platform skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Tools for crypto app development, live agent work, data, and infrastructure
interface.longDescription: Bundles Alchemy's public skills: alchemy-cli (live work via local CLI), alchemy-mcp (live work via hosted MCP server), alchemy-api (app code with API key), and agentic-gateway (app code with x402/MPP). Each skill self-routes — pick the path that matches whether you're doing live agent work or wiring Alchemy into application code.
defaultPrompt: Use the Alchemy CLI to fetch the latest ETH block and my token balances
Build a crypto prices dashboard in React using my Alchemy API key
Build a Solana asset viewer using the DAS API
